data.title: Infinix launches NOTE Edge with 3D curved-screen for premium users. Released in HONG KONG on Jan. 19, 2026.
data.description: In Hong Kong on January 19, 2026, Infinix introduced the NOTE Edge smartphone, featuring a unique 3D curved-screen design tailored for users seeking both top-notch visuals and extensive functionality. This device, positioned as the newest member of the Infinix lineup, aims to cater to individuals who prioritize premium aesthetics and high performance.

data.title: Poolwerx expands to Riverside, CA with new franchise owners Donald and Phyllis. Largest global pool service brand.
data.description: A well-known franchise specializing in pool, hot tub, and spa services, Poolwerx, has expanded its reach to a new territory as part of its nationwide growth strategy. The franchise, which is recognized as the largest global brand in its sector, is currently focusing on expanding its operations. The latest development involves Franchise Owners Donald and Phyllis who have taken on the responsibility of managing the new territory. This move aligns with Poolwerx's ambitious goals for growth and strategic expansion across the country.

data.title: Area 15 Ventures and Port of Subs® announce leadership changes, including Adam Contos, Dave Liniger, and Healey Mendicino.
data.description: Three prominent figures in the industry, Adam Contos, Dave Liniger, and Healey Mendicino, are stepping into new roles within Area 15 Ventures, a franchise growth engine. The leadership transitions were disclosed on Jan. 19, 2026. These changes signal a significant shift towards growth across both organizations under their guidance. This move marks a new era for Area 15 Ventures as it looks to capitalize on opportunities.

data.title: Wahed launches new UCITS ETFs integrating Shariah compliance and ethical values, catering to human rights, injustice.
data.description: On January 19, 2026, Wahed, a top Islamic fintech and investment manager, unveiled a pioneering range of UCITS equity ETFs blending Shariah compliance with a discretionary review system influenced by Islamic principles. This launch marks a significant advancement in the financial sector.

data.title: Micron Technology invests $1.8 billion in Taiwanese chip fab to enhance DRAM production for AI-driven demand.
data.description: Micron Technology has announced its plan to purchase a chip fabrication site in Taiwan for $1.8 billion in response to the rapidly increasing demand for DRAM memory due to advancements in artificial intelligence technology. This acquisition aims to enhance Micron's production capacity for DRAM memory chips.

data.title: Netflix had its biggest holiday season, with Christmas 2025 breaking records and capturing 54% of US TV viewing.
data.description: Netflix Inc. (NASDAQ: NFLX) is entering its Q4 earnings with strong momentum after a booming holiday season in 2025. On Christmas Day, streaming accounted for 54% of U.S. TV viewing, totaling a record 55.1 billion minutes, per Nielsen Data shared with Axios. Netflix played a significant role in this surge, streaming its first Christmas Day NFL game. This has elevated Netflix to the level of major broadcasters in the media industry. Additionally, for the week of Dec. 15-21, Nielsen's Top 10 highlighted Netflix's hit series "Stranger Things" as a popular choice among viewers. More details on this story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Canada drops tariffs on Chinese-made EVs, benefiting Tesla with 460% increase in imports to Vancouver. Tesla gains edge with exports to Berlin. China's BYD and Nio have no sales presence in Canada. Tesla operates 39 stores in the country.
data.description: Experts believe that Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ: TSLA) is poised to benefit greatly from Canada's recent decision to eliminate tariffs on Chinese-made electric vehicles (EVs). The Elon Musk-led company is expected to gain an edge in the market due to its strategic moves, including the shipment of vehicles from Shanghai to Canada starting in 2023. This has already led to a significant 460% increase in Chinese auto imports to Vancouver. In response to Canada imposing 100% tariffs to address China's state-backed overcapacity, Tesla has redirected exports of the Model Y to Berlin, while the lower-cost Model 3 variants continue to be primarily manufactured in China. With 39 stores already in operation across Canada, Tesla enjoys a significant advantage over its Chinese competitors like BYD (OTC: BYDDF) and Nio, which currently have no sales presence in the country. Despite the requirement that half of the import quota be reserved for vehicles priced below 35,000 CAD ($25,189), Tesla's strategic positioning and existing infrastructure in Canada put it in a favorable position for growth.

data.title: FlashIntel rebrands as FlashLabs to become a top autonomous AI player. The company changed its name on Jan. 19, 2026.
data.description: On January 19, 2026, in San Francisco, FlashIntel, a pioneering AI-driven sales intelligence firm, revealed its new identity as FlashLabs. This rebrand signifies a significant shift for the company from being a top provider of sales automation services.

data.title: Antique items fetch $2.7 million+ at Morphy's auction, including $86,100 for a popcorn wagon and $68,880 for a glass sign.
data.description: In recent news, a Cretors & Company Model D horse-drawn popcorn wagon from circa 1905 was sold for a remarkable $86,100 in Las Vegas. Another standout item was an Owl 'Cigar Store' reverse-painted glass sign, fetching $68,880 at the auction. Additionally, a Mr. Peanut cast-iron peanut roaster was auctioned off for an impressive $67,650. These sales reflect the high demand and value placed on vintage and collectible items in today's market.

data.title: Zero-sugar LO SECCO Prosecco expands U.S. distribution to 8 markets, launching new website; available nationwide.
data.description: On January 19, 2026, LO SECCO Prosecco DOC Brut Nature, the sugar-free sparkling wine from Italy's Veneto region, revealed the introduction of its new website tailored for consumers. The brand also disclosed plans for wider distribution in significant U.S. markets such as Connecticut, Minnesota, and more.

data.title: New feminist apparel brand, The Vibe Expert, offers bold statement pieces in US with the debut of pro-women T-Shirts, Hoodies, and Totes, available nationwide.
data.description: A new feminist apparel brand called The Vibe Expert has recently been launched in Solapur, India. The brand offers a range of feminist-themed T-shirts, hoodies, and totes that are printed on demand in the U.S. These products are now made available nationwide, allowing women to showcase their values in a bold and witty manner. The launch took place on January 19, 2026, and the brand aims to empower women through its pro-women merchandise.
